mode_selection_rationale: Pre-flight Operator Directive Discovery surfaced 2 pending directives at medium priority (both filed 2026-05-14). Per tinker.md dispatcher logic, candidates with equal priority and missing issued_at sort by filename — DIRECTIVE-20260514-001-analyst-summary-write-gap won. Directive overrides Mode 1-4 selection. Routed to Mode 4 (Proposals & Self-Fixes) by directive's scope_authority='Design proposal only (PROP-NNN)'. The second pending directive (DIRECTIVE-20260514-002-curmudgeon-discovery-vs-verify-split) will be picked up on a subsequent run.

directive_processed.title: Investigate + propose canonical fix for the analyst summary-write gap

previous_followup.note: Prior tinker reports examined for unresolved findings — none required this-run verification beyond the directive's scope. PROP-030 backlog-trend pre-flight executed below (mandatory every run).
previous_followup.prop_lifecycle_verification_summary: Not exhaustively walked this run — directive's scope is a focused investigation, not a full lifecycle audit. Last full PROP-walk was tinker-2026-05-13T21-54Z. PROP-030 metrics show healthy trend (open_issues 207→62 over 3 days, net velocity +126/7d), indicating recent PROPs (PROP-026 burndown, PROP-034 Phase 1 baby) are working. No STILL_BROKEN claims from prior reports require re-verification this run.

threshold_evaluation.info_5pct_wow_growth: FALSE — actually shrunk significantly (143 on 2026-05-14, now 62; -57% over 24h)
threshold_evaluation.qualitative_observation: Queue is healthy and trending strongly downward. The 207→62 drop over 3 days suggests PROP-026 burndown mode and/or PROP-034 baby drain are working as designed. Baby's 7d drain count is 0 in this metric because the expansion-tracker doesn't yet have completed_at timestamps on items that flipped via consolidation paths — that's a measurement gap, not a baby-not-working signal.

findings.summary: PROP-036 authored as design-pending-operator-review. Three confirmed bugs documented: (1) dispatcher-wide summary-write gap from V6 refactor 2026-04-08; (2) monitor/analysis vs monitor/analyst path typo in 3 prompt files; (3) tinker's pipeline-health audit doesn't probe the analyst sentinel. All three fixes bundled into one PROP for atomicity. Recommended Option D (hybrid): dispatcher postlude in analyst.md + path-typo fixes + substantive-output cross-check in tinker-pipeline-health.md. Self-apply NONE — operator reviews first.
evidence: monitor/analysis/latest-analysis-summary.txt mtime 2026-05-04 — typo-path also stale; not in git
6 typo occurrences across 3 files (analyst-normal-analysis.md, decider-intake.md, tinker-infrastructure.md)
Per-mode audit: 8 of 9 analyst modes lack any summary-write step (only Normal mode prescribes it, and it writes to the typo path)
Commit 713f800 (2026-04-08) is the V6 dispatcher refactor that introduced the gap; predates Apr-25 visibility trigger by 17 days, refuting the directive's PROP-022-Phase-1 hypothesis
findings.recommendation: Operator review PROP-036; on approval, tinker self-applies the 5 prompt edits + migration bash under PROP-014-amendment-001 Q6 lifecycle, OR operator routes via fresh directive.

findings.summary: Tinker's Mode 1 dispatcher staleness probe at tinker.md:121-125 does not include monitor/analyst/latest-analysis-summary.txt. This is the root cause of why the 19-day stale sentinel was caught by the operator manually rather than by tinker's regular pipeline-health audit.
evidence: tinker.md line 121: probe list is monitor/changes/latest-poll-summary.txt, monitor/curmudgeon/tracker.json, monitor/decisions/daily-report-*.json, monitor/analyst/expansion-tracker.json — no analyst sentinel
findings.fix_bundled_in_prop_036: PROP-036 edit_5 adds the analyst sentinel to tinker.md's probe list AND adds the symmetric substantive-output cross-check to detect sentinel-broken-agent-healthy and sentinel-only-fresh failure modes.

findings.summary: DIRECTIVE-20260514-002-curmudgeon-discovery-vs-verify-split remains status=pending. Same priority (medium), same filing date (2026-05-14, later in day at 23:30Z than -001's 05:30Z). Will be the dispatcher's selection on next tinker run unless a higher-priority directive is filed before then.
findings.recommendation: No action this run; the next tinker invocation will pick it up. Estimated investigation effort: ~30-60 min for the curmudgeon discovery-vs-verify split design (PROP-034-baby-analog pattern, well-precedented), comparable to this run's PROP-036 effort.

findings.summary: Project-induced /tmp footprint reached ~780MB during investigation (check-clone added to existing edit-clone). Cleaned up check-clone after git-fetch failed due to disk-full. Empowerment check: /tmp/edit-clone is 486MB and only 3.5h old (mtime 2026-05-14T23:07Z) — does not satisfy >24h auto-cleanup threshold; left in place. Investigation was completed without that clone by using GitHub API directly.
evidence: /tmp/edit-clone: 486M, mtime 3.5h ago — not auto-cleanup-eligible per tinker standing-empowerment-clone-cleanup rules

cleanup_actions.reason: Created this run for git-log lookup but git-fetch failed on disk-full; not needed once GitHub commits-API approach was substituted. Removed during investigation. Not an empowerment-class cleanup since the clone was created and removed in the same run, but logged here for full audit.

findings.recommendation: If next operator session is going to leave /tmp/edit-clone idle, consider cleaning it manually to recover ~486MB. Tinker's empowerment-class cleanup will pick it up automatically after 24h.
